name: agentic-qe
description: Tool-agnostic AI blueprints for Quality Engineering, organized by STLC stage and written in the agentic-os design language: blast-radius role tags, human review gates, and model tiers. The qe-blueprints skill scaffolds a ready-to-fill agent framework from a chosen blueprint; the eval-harness skill generates a two-layer evaluation framework for skills and agents.
